patient_A.query: "breast cancer" AND "stage I" AND latest studies OR clinical trials OR meta-analysis AND 2023..2026 AND "HR+/HER2-" AND "ER+" OR "PR+" OR "HER2-" AND "newly diagnosed" AND "age 46"
patient_A.answer: Recent studies show promising results for HR+/HER2- breast cancer in newly diagnosed patients, with clinical trials focusing on new drug combinations and therapies. Meta-analyses highlight improved outcomes post-CDK4/6 inhibitors. Ongoing trials in 2026 explore novel treatment strategies.
